title: Capitalium-Modpack
description:
This is the modpack used for the capitalium-factory server.
it is based on a create modpack with generation mods
body:
# Capitalium Factory 

Unleash a brand-new *Minecraft* experience with **Capitalium factory modpack**, a modpack designed to revolutionize world generation and enhance your technological progression!

## Explore a Transformed World  
With advanced terrain generation mods, discover breathtaking landscapes, diverse biomes, realistic caves, and improved structures that bring a fresh sense of adventure to your journey.

## Master Cutting-Edge Technology  
From automation with create mod and energy systems to high-tech machinery, this modpack introduces powerful industrial mods that will take your gameplay to the next level. Build complex factories, generate endless power, and optimize your resource management like never before.

## Key Features  
- **Enhanced world generation** with realistic landscapes and new biomes  
- **Advanced tech mods** for automation, energy, and machinery  
- **Balanced progression** between exploration and industry  
- **Optimized performance** to ensure smooth gameplay
